creator: rene@FreeBSD.org
text:
On 13.0-amd64 r341988 (vanilla sources), sometimes less throws an assertion failure wrt jemalloc when viewing /usr/ports/Mk/bsd.port.mk and using forward search ( "/" key):

<jemalloc>: /usr/src-vanilla/contrib/jemalloc/include/jemalloc/internal/extent_inlines.h:63: Failed assertion: "szind < NSIZES"

Core dump is available.
